case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. KATY SUZUKI et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUZUKI, KATY $5,445.12 PRINCIPAL, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,738.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
